comment.body:
as a scientist, I don’t have any particular opinion on aliens. 
we cannot even estimate the probabilities. Abiogenesis is still practically nowhere, we’ve barely made any progress. 
We cannot estimate the probability of life arising, what forms of life are possible, or whether our definition of life itself is even complete in the first place...
